message:
chore(audit): batch 407 — messaging/control.rs SOUND (~3,895 lines)

Fresh-eyes audit of control advisory system: CRDT propagation (PN-counter,
join-semilattice, delta with anti-entropy), advisory damping policy,
membership state machine, namespace kernel. 89 tests. 0 bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
